Director Assertive Voice. Listen to how I say this phrase using the voice. I think that was a really smart idea. This voice is counterproductive. You might as well forget about using this one, even though a lot of you do naturally. With this voice, you're signaling dominance onto your counterpart, and they will aggressively or passively aggressively push back against attempts to be controlled. This voice essentially undoes any progress you've made. Let's listen to that phrase and that voice one more time. I think that was a really smart idea.
